name: webjetcms-tests
description: Automated testing, after update of codeceptjs chromium change version in dev-reload-client.js

scripts.all: CODECEPT_URL='http://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_RESTART='session' CODECEPT_SHOW=false CODECEPT_AUTODELAY='true' TESTOMATIO_DISABLE_UPLOAD=1 codeceptjs run -p testomatio
scripts.all:prod: CODECEPT_RESTART='session' CODECEPT_SHOW=false CODECEPT_AUTODELAY='true' TESTOMATIO_DISABLE_UPLOAD=1 codeceptjs run -p testomatio
scripts.all:show: CODECEPT_URL='http://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_RESTART='session' CODECEPT_AUTODELAY='true' TESTOMATIO_DISABLE_UPLOAD=1 codeceptjs run -p testomatio
scripts.all:prod:show: CODECEPT_RESTART='session' CODECEPT_AUTODELAY='true' TESTOMATIO_DISABLE_UPLOAD=1 codeceptjs run -p testomatio
scripts.parallel2: CODECEPT_URL='http://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_RESTART='session' CODECEPT_SHOW=false CODECEPT_AUTODELAY='true' TESTOMATIO_DISABLE_UPLOAD=1 codeceptjs run-workers --suites 2 -p testomatio --grep '(?=.*)^(?!.*@singlethread)'
scripts.parallel4: CODECEPT_URL='http://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_RESTART='session' CODECEPT_SHOW=false CODECEPT_AUTODELAY='true' TESTOMATIO_DISABLE_UPLOAD=1 codeceptjs run-workers --suites 4 -p testomatio --grep '(?=.*)^(?!.*@singlethread)'
scripts.parallel6: CODECEPT_URL='http://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_RESTART='session' CODECEPT_SHOW=false CODECEPT_AUTODELAY='true' TESTOMATIO_DISABLE_UPLOAD=1 codeceptjs run-workers --suites 6 -p testomatio --grep '(?=.*)^(?!.*@singlethread)'
scripts.parallel8: CODECEPT_URL='http://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_RESTART='session' CODECEPT_SHOW=false CODECEPT_AUTODELAY='true' TESTOMATIO_DISABLE_UPLOAD=1 codeceptjs run-workers --suites 8 -p testomatio --grep '(?=.*)^(?!.*@singlethread)'
scripts.parallel12: CODECEPT_URL='http://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_RESTART='session' CODECEPT_SHOW=false CODECEPT_AUTODELAY='true' TESTOMATIO_DISABLE_UPLOAD=1 codeceptjs run-workers --suites 12 -p testomatio --grep '(?=.*)^(?!.*@singlethread)'
scripts.singlethread: CODECEPT_URL='http://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_RESTART='session' CODECEPT_SHOW=false CODECEPT_AUTODELAY='true' TESTOMATIO_DISABLE_UPLOAD=1 codeceptjs run -p testomatio --grep '@singlethread'
scripts.pause: CODECEPT_URL='http://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_RESTART='session' CODECEPT_AUTODELAY='true' codeceptjs run --steps -p pause
scripts.current: CODECEPT_URL='http://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_RESTART='session' CODECEPT_AUTODELAY='true' codeceptjs run --steps -p pause --grep '@current'
scripts.baseTest:pause: CODECEPT_URL='http://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_RESTART='session' CODECEPT_AUTODELAY='true' codeceptjs run --steps -p pause --grep '@baseTest'
scripts.ff:all: CODECEPT_URL='http://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_RESTART='session' CODECEPT_BROWSER=firefox CODECEPT_SHOW=false TESTOMATIO_DISABLE_UPLOAD=1 codeceptjs run -p testomatio
scripts.ff:all:prod: CODECEPT_RESTART='session' CODECEPT_BROWSER=firefox CODECEPT_SHOW=false TESTOMATIO_DISABLE_UPLOAD=1 codeceptjs run -p testomatio
scripts.ff:all:show: CODECEPT_URL='http://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_RESTART='session' CODECEPT_BROWSER=firefox TESTOMATIO_DISABLE_UPLOAD=1 codeceptjs run -p testomatio
scripts.ff:current: CODECEPT_URL='http://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_RESTART='session' CODECEPT_BROWSER=firefox codeceptjs run --steps -p pause --grep '@current'
scripts.ff:current:hide: CODECEPT_URL='http://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_RESTART='session' CODECEPT_BROWSER=firefox CODECEPT_SHOW=false codeceptjs run --steps -p pause --grep '@current'
scripts.scr:en: CODECEPT_SCREENSHOTS='true' CODECEPT_URL='https://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_LNG=en CODECEPT_AUTODELAY='true' codeceptjs run --override '{ "tests": "./screenshots/generator/**/*.js"}' --steps
scripts.scr:cs: CODECEPT_SCREENSHOTS='true' CODECEPT_URL='https://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_LNG=cs CODECEPT_AUTODELAY='true' codeceptjs run --override '{ "tests": "./screenshots/generator/**/*.js"}' --steps
scripts.scr:current: CODECEPT_SCREENSHOTS='true' CODECEPT_URL='https://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_AUTODELAY='true' codeceptjs run --override '{ "tests": "./screenshots/generator/**/*.js"}' --steps -p pause --grep '@current' --debug
scripts.scr:tests: CODECEPT_SCREENSHOTS='true' CODECEPT_URL='https://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_RESTART='session' CODECEPT_AUTODELAY='true' codeceptjs run --steps -p pause --grep '@screenshot'
scripts.scr:tests:current: CODECEPT_SCREENSHOTS='true' CODECEPT_URL='https://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_RESTART='session' CODECEPT_AUTODELAY='true' codeceptjs run --steps -p pause --grep '@screenshot @current'
scripts.ff:scr:current: CODECEPT_SCREENSHOTS='true' CODECEPT_URL='https://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_BROWSER=firefox CODECEPT_AUTODELAY='true' codeceptjs run --override '{ "tests": "./screenshots/generator/**/*.js"}' --steps -p pause --grep '@current'
scripts.scr:current:en: CODECEPT_SCREENSHOTS='true' CODECEPT_URL='https://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_LNG=en CODECEPT_AUTODELAY='true' codeceptjs run --override '{ "tests": "./screenshots/generator/**/*.js"}' --steps -p pause --grep '@current'
scripts.scr:current:cs: CODECEPT_SCREENSHOTS='true' CODECEPT_URL='https://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_LNG=cs CODECEPT_AUTODELAY='true' codeceptjs run --override '{ "tests": "./screenshots/generator/**/*.js"}' --steps -p pause --grep '@current'
scripts.ff:scr:current:en: CODECEPT_SCREENSHOTS='true' CODECEPT_URL='https://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_BROWSER=firefox CODECEPT_LNG=en CODECEPT_AUTODELAY='true' codeceptjs run --override '{ "tests": "./screenshots/generator/**/*.js"}' --steps -p pause --grep '@current'
scripts.scr:current:prod:en: CODECEPT_SCREENSHOTS='true' CODECEPT_LNG=en CODECEPT_AUTODELAY='true' codeceptjs run --override '{ "tests": "./screenshots/generator/**/*.js"}' --steps -p pause --grep '@current'
scripts.a11y: CODECEPT_URL='http://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_RESTART='session' CODECEPT_AUTODELAY='true' CODECEPT_SHOW=false codeceptjs run --steps --override '{ "tests": "./tests/a11y/**/*.js"}'
scripts.a11y:pause: CODECEPT_URL='http://iwcm.interway.sk' CODECEPT_RESTART='session' CODECEPT_AUTODELAY='true' codeceptjs run --steps -p pause --override '{ "tests": "./tests/a11y/**/*.js"}'

author: Lubos Balat, InterWay, a. s.
